title: Bonsaii 6-Sheet Strip-Cut Paper Shredder, Small Paper Shredder for Home Use, Can be Used Without Bin, Extendable Arm Design with Overheat Protection, 9 Liter Bin, S123-A
features: [Versatile and Portable] The Bonsaii Paper Shredder is designed with an adjustable arm (28cm-38cm) to fit both round and square waste paper baskets, making it easy to move and store. It includes a 9L trash bin with a viewing window to monitor fill levels

[Efficient and Reliable] This shredder can handle up to 6 sheets at once and runs continuously for 2 minutes, ensuring quick and reliable shredding performance. Please note that after 2 minutes of use, the machine requires a 20-minute cooling period.
[Enhanced Security] With a 6mm strip cut, this shredder provides security level 2, effectively disposing of sensitive documents
[Easy Maintenance] The Jam Remover button allows for easy clearing of paper jams, while the Auto mode provides automatic start/stop functionality for hassle-free operation
[Operational Awareness] The red light indicator alerts you when the machine is overheating. For optimal performance, allow the shredder a 20-minute rest after 2 minutes of continuous use
description: Product Description Bonsaii 6-Sheet Strip Cut Paper Shredder for Personal Use - Great for Your Home Use Bonsaii - Let Secret Be Secret IMPORTANT Q&A Q: The shredder overheats shortly after shredding, what should I do? A: The shredder has an overheating protection device that is triggered after more than 2 minutes of continuous use and needs to be cooled down for 20 minutes before it can be used again. If the machine is shredded for more than 2 minutes during the last use and has not cooled down for more than 20 minutes, this will result in the machine overheating very quickly the next time it is used. Q: The strip-cut shredder is jammed. What should I do? A: Please switch to FWD mode and shred the jammed paper compulsorily. If there is too much paper scraps in the feed slot, sliding to FWD mode for a few seconds and then to REV mode for a few seconds to clear it. Q: Why is the number of sheets that can be shredded lower than the maximum number of sheets described? A: Please check if the paper is damp, contains plastic or too thick, if so, please let the paper dry before shredding, or reduce shredding sheets per pass. To extend the lifetime of the paper shredder, please don't shred more than 6 sheets in one time. Q: The shredder is broken, but the return window is closed. What should I do? A: bonsaii provides a 2-year service. No matter whether the return window is closed or not, we will provide you with the best solution.*Please ensure that you provide valid reply address to avoid any issues with receiving our response. Use Tips Refer to the user manual and troubleshooting guide before use. To avoid paper jams caused by overloading the machine, check and clean the cutter in good time. Please wait until the paper is completely shredded before adding new paper. When the bin is full, please clean it out in time to avoid affecting the reversing function and making the machine unusable. Shredder Oil Packs are recommended to regularly sharpen, clean and lubricate the shredder blades for optimum shredder performance. *When using the oil pack for cleaning, please take care to empty the waste bin of shredded paper first. To prolong the life of the shredder, it is recommended to regularly clean both the shredder bin and the dust inside the machine. Do not spray or keep any aerosol products in or around the shredder. As part of Bonsaii quality inspections, we test every shredder before shipping it, which means you may see some paper shreds from the testing.
